applied_optimizations.name: atomic_gemm_m_threshold_config
applied_optimizations.description: Added M-threshold gating to atomic GEMM config for BF16 matmul. Changed BLOCK_SIZE_M from fixed 256 to 64/128/256 based on M dimension, reducing block size for small-batch decode.

applied_optimizations.name: fp8_gemm_m_threshold_config
applied_optimizations.description: Added M-threshold gating to FP8 GEMM config for MoE. Changed BLOCK_SIZE_M from fixed 128 to 64 for M<=128 shapes, reducing block size for small-batch decode.

applied_optimizations.name: fp8_gemm_num_ksplit_config
applied_optimizations.description: Enabled K-split parallelism (NUM_KSPLIT=2) for FP8 GEMM config on M_LEQ_64 and M_LEQ_128 shapes. This enables K-dimension parallelism for small-batch decode, significantly improving throughput for large K dimensions in MoE expert GEMMs.
